commands.summary: Ran desktop lint/typecheck, Vitest, and production build. Vitest: 97 files passed, 838 tests passed. Build completed successfully.

validation_output.diagnostics: No separate lsp_diagnostics tool is available in this runtime; TypeScript no-emit via check:desktop passed.
warnings: Existing React act(...) warnings appeared in src/__tests__/generalSettings.test.tsx during the desktop test run; they did not fail the gate and were unrelated to this type-only change.

must_preserve_evidence.MP-001_MP-002_MP-009_saved_provider_scop: The new ProviderBundle contains only provider bundle metadata and ProviderBundleProvider records; no chat, MCP, skills, workflows, plugins, global settings, or whole-app backup fields were added.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-003_MP-005_secret_paths: Defined separate ProviderExportResponse with ProviderSecretFreeBundle containsSecrets:false and ProviderSecretExportRequest/ProviderSecretExportResponse with ProviderSecretBundle containsSecrets:true plus confirmation.acknowledgedCredentialExposure:true.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-004_MP-010_redaction_boundary: Credential payload is represented as ProviderBundleCredential with status redacted|present|missing; default export response is typed as secret-free. No frontend-only masking behavior was introduced.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-006_conflict_resolution: Import conflict/resolution types include add, rename, overwrite, and skip; overwrite remains an explicit resolution with optional targetProviderId carried only on the resolution type.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-007_no_active_default_transfer: No activeId/default selection fields exist on ProviderBundle, ProviderBundleProvider, export requests, import preview requests, commit requests, or resolutions. The only activeId field is in ProviderImportCommitResult, matching the API contract's unchanged activeId response.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-008_preview_commit_separation: Preview and commit have separate request/response types: ProviderImportPreviewRequest/Response and ProviderImportCommitRequest/Response.

concerns: Project cognition query was attempted and blocked with: status.json exists but project-cognition.db is missing. This matches the feature plan's known cognition gap, so implementation proceeded from live repository evidence and authoritative feature artifacts.
The repository has many pre-existing unrelated dirty files. I only modified desktop/src/types/providerImportExport.ts.
ProviderImportCommitResult includes activeId solely because the API contract response includes an unchanged activeId; downstream code should not treat it as an imported or selectable value.
recovery_hints: If downstream API/store work needs these types, import from desktop/src/types/providerImportExport.ts and keep active/default provider selection out of request and bundle payloads.
If the server contract changes field names, update this desktop type file in lockstep with contracts/provider-import-export-api.md.
Do not wire ProviderSecretExportRequest into the default export path; it is the separate dangerous path.
consumer_evidence: Task evidence was consumed by downstream join points and final verification; see implement-tracker completed_checks plus this result validation_output.
